description: Vigilbase provides managed cybersecurity services and free security analysis tools such as website, header, email, and Cloudflare security checks. Its products focus on website protection, threat monitoring, and managed Cloudflare security.
summary: Vigilbase exposes a public unauthenticated HTTP API on `vigilbase.com` with an OpenAPI spec for its security badge endpoint, plus a separate authenticated platform HTTP API on `one.vigilbase.com` whose OpenAPI URL exists but requires OAuth-protected access.
